name: empty-state
title: Empty State
description: Neutral placeholder for no-data / no-results / not-available panels, with icon, title, description, and an action slot.

props.name: icon
props.description: Illustrative icon, framed in a muted circle.

props.name: title
props.description: Required. Short statement of what is missing.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional supporting sentence and what to do next.

clinicalNotes: An empty panel in a clinical dashboard is ambiguous — it can mean 'no data recorded' OR 'data failed to load'. Always give the empty state a title that states which, and where possible an action to record the first entry. Never leave a vitals/meds/labs panel visually blank; a blank panel reads as a system error to a clinician under time pressure.
notes: Layer-M0 scaffolding. Referenced by widget-panel's empty state and by dashboard tables.
